blocks.text: Match preview: Sri Lanka A face Afghanistan A in 6th Match (ODI) on Fri, 19 Jun, 2026, 10:00 am at Rangiri Dambulla International Stadium Dambulla. Full pitch report, weather forecast, and squad details below.

rows: Sri Lanka A vs Afghanistan A
Tri Nation A Series in Sri Lanka  2026

blocks.text: Standard ODI surface expected. Conditions will be clearer at the toss — monitor team selection and dew factor for night games.
Expected par score: 250–290 runs par score.
Drizzle · High 30°C / Low 24°C · Rain: 1.8 mm · Wind: up to 24 km/h. Light rain possible — overcast conditions could assist swing bowling early.
International playing XI is announced at the toss. Check back on match day for confirmed line-ups.
